mission.title: opentofu: Allow Variable Validation Conditions to Refer to Other Variables
mission.description: Allow Variable Validation Conditions to Refer to Other Variables. Requested by 54+ users.

steps.title: Check OpenTofu installation
steps.description:
Verify your OpenTofu version:
```bash
tofu version
```
This feature requires OpenTofu installed locally. Install via `brew install opentofu` or download from https://opentofu.org/docs/intro/install/.

steps.title: Understand the feature context
steps.description:
### Use Cases

I want to be able to have conditional validation on variables - the condition being the value of other variables.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Allow Variable Validation Conditions to Refer to Other…
steps.description:
GraphNodeReferenceOutside is a hack that allows variables to span the caller and callee of modules.  GraphNodeReferenceOutside checks are required to make sure the scope of variable evaluation is correct.
## Target Release

1.9.0

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the feature is working as expected:
```bash
tofu version
tofu validate
tofu plan
```
Confirm that the feature described in "Allow Variable Validation Conditions to Refer to Other Variables" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
GraphNodeReferenceOutside is a hack that allows variables to span the caller and callee of modules.  GraphNodeReferenceOutside checks are required to make sure the scope of variable evaluation is correct.
## Target Release

1.9.0

prerequisites.description: OpenTofu CLI installed (brew install opentofu or download from opentofu.org). Terraform provider credentials as needed for the specific configuration.
